case_for: Stafford's pregame projection of 27.8 points is more than double the 12.0 threshold, and he cleared it in 4 of his last 6 games including two 20+ point outings.
case_against: His volatility is evident from two sub-10 point duds (4.0 and 9.7) in the last six weeks, showing real bust potential if the offense stalls or turnovers occur.
